question: A month after the Israel-Hamas war stops will Israel still be firing rockets into Syria or Lebanon
reason: Recent Israeli airstrikes in Gaza and southern Lebanon indicate ongoing military operations.
evidence: On May 27, 2026, Israeli airstrikes killed Hamas's new military leader in Gaza. ([apnews.com](https://apnews.com/article/4861f7c0c9cfda914007dfff975bae7a?utm_source=openai))

On May 22, 2026, Israeli airstrikes in southern Lebanon resulted in 10 deaths, including paramedics and a child. ([apnews.com](https://apnews.com/article/38cb2350059d56074456fb4ef0271d84?utm_source=openai))
